data.title: Nigeria Hits Binance With $81 Billion Lawsuit Alleging Economic Damages And Unpaid Taxes
data.description: Nigeria launched a legal battle against the world’s largest cryptocurrency exchange Binance (CRYPTO: BNB) on Wednesday, demanding $81.5 billion in compensation for purported economic damages and unpaid taxes.

data.title: Warren Buffett's Favorite Energy Stock Occidental Petroleum Achieves Near-Term Debt Reduction Target 7 Months Early In Q4: Management Sets $1.2 Billion Target For Q1
data.description: Occidental Petroleum reduced its near-term debt 7 months ahead of schedule amid mixed Q4 results and expects a $1.2 billion reduction in Q1.

data.title: Javier Milei-Backed LIBRA Token Creator Reportedly Removed $99 Million In Liquidity —Traders Lose Over $250 Million
data.description: The scandal-plagued LIBRA token saw approximately $99 million worth of invested liquidity withdrawn by entities tied to the cryptocurrency’s creator, according to a media report on Wednesday.

data.title: 'Reduce Deficits And Debt… Full Stop,' Says Craig Shapiro As Trump Mulls 'DOGE Dividend' By Giving Away 20% Of Its Savings To Public
data.description: As Trump wants to reward taxpayers from DOGE savings this economist says it must be dedicated to deficit, debt reduction, inflation control.

data.title: Tesla To Pilot Virtual Queue System At Select Superchargers In Q2: 'Wider Rollout This Year If Feedback Is Positive'
data.description: EV giant Tesla said on Wednesday that it will start a virtual queuing system at select supercharger sites in the second quarter.
